# Vancouver Island Regional Database (VIRD)

## Core Catalogues
- [Water Systems Catalogue](https://vancouver-island-regional-database.github.io/water-systems/): Public disclosure mirror for regional water assets, audits, and minutes.
- [Natural Resources Catalogue](https://vancouver-island-regional-database.github.io/natural-resources/): Public disclosure mirror for regional natural resources data and minutes.
- [Land Use Planning Catalogue](https://vancouver-island-regional-database.github.io/land-use-planning/): Public disclosure mirror for regional land use planning data and minutes.
- [Public Officials Catalogue](https://vancouver-island-regional-database.github.io/public-officials/): Public disclosure mirror for data and minutes regarding regional public officials.
